description: You are a QA engineer auditing verification traceability for a v2.0 release. The SRS document has a 'Release' attribute — requirements tagged 'v2.0' must each have a correct verification link to a TESTS item whose subject matches the requirement. Open the SRS document and examine every v2.0 requirement. Identify those with no verification link and those with incorrect links (where the linked test case covers a different topic than the requirement). For missing links, find the matching test case in the TESTS document and create the verification link. For incorrect links, remove the wrong link and create the correct one. After fixing each requirement, update its Status: set to 'Blocked' if its Priority is 'High', or to 'Reviewed' otherwise. Save all changes. The application is already open with the project loaded.
